title: manihot gracilis var. tenuifolia
intro: Manihot gracilis var. tenuifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved manihot or narrow-leaved cassava, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, or dried and made into a powder for use in herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine for its wound-healing and anti-inflammatory properties.
